title: Endless Expedition SMP
description: Endless Expedition's Quality of Life pack specifically made for the Endless Expedition SMP
body:
# Endless Expedition's Quality of Life
This pack focusses on bringing the best and easiest Minecraft experience while also maintaining the vanilla experience. I made this pack specifically for my Endless Expedition SMP server. It has some mods that make your life a little easier without crossing the line of "cheating".

It also provides a few Content Creator friendly mods such as Flashback and Camera Utils. Not every mod that i wanted is updated to 1.21.1 so if anything could be added please let me know through my Discord!

# 

### HOW TO INSTALL:
1. Download the Modrinth app
2. Search for Endless Expedition SMP and click install
3. Run the instance, check your resourcepacks and your settings / keybinds and have fun!
# 
### **Recommended to use at least 8GB of RAM if you're planning to run Flashback**
# 
### IMPORTANT: To render in Flashback you need to disable Essential due to an incompatibility. If you're not using anything from the Essential mod you could disable it entirely yourself.
# 

### Join the [ Discord](https://discord.gg/tnB9Wbdaqd)
